product: Automatic identity management for Okta (Public Preview) ​
tagline: June 9, 2026 Automatic identity management now supports Okta in Public Preview.
what_it_does: June 9, 2026 Automatic identity management now supports Okta in Public Preview. You can sync users and groups from Okta into Databricks without configuring SCIM provisioning.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.

capabilities.title: June 9, 2026 Automatic
capabilities.desc: June 9, 2026 Automatic identity management now supports Okta in Public Preview.
